textPlain: Writing for AI honestly doesn't seem much different to writing for pagerank algorithms which SEO specialists have been doing for years. The only change is that almost all the SEO content on the web is now being written by AI, for AI to later summarise.

The most valuable writing for AI is writing that in no way caters to AI. AI is using human writing to train itself, not to have a dialog. Any writing tainted with AI awareness is going to be a little less effective in giving AI the world sense that it needs.
